Case# INSendMessageRecipientUnsupportedReason.requiringInAppAuthentication

iOS 17.0+iPadOS 17.0+Mac Catalyst 17.0+macOS 14.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 10.0+

```
case requiringInAppAuthentication
```

## [See Also](/documentation/Intents/INSendMessageRecipientUnsupportedReason/requiringInAppAuthentication#see-also)

### [Enumeration Cases](/documentation/Intents/INSendMessageRecipientUnsupportedReason/requiringInAppAuthentication#Enumeration-Cases)

[`case noAccount`](/documentation/intents/insendmessagerecipientunsupportedreason/noaccount)A recipient without an account.[`case offline`](/documentation/intents/insendmessagerecipientunsupportedreason/offline)An offline recipient.[`case messagingServiceNotEnabledForRecipient`](/documentation/intents/insendmessagerecipientunsupportedreason/messagingservicenotenabledforrecipient)A recipient for whom messaging is not enabled.[`case noHandleForLabel`](/documentation/intents/insendmessagerecipientunsupportedreason/nohandleforlabel)A recipient for whom there is no handle for the provided label.[`case noValidHandle`](/documentation/intents/insendmessagerecipientunsupportedreason/novalidhandle)A recipient for whom there is no valid handle.[`case requestedHandleInvalid`](/documentation/intents/insendmessagerecipientunsupportedreason/requestedhandleinvalid)A recipient for whom the requested handle is invalid.
